name: Peanut Butter Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2 Have the kisses unwrapped before removing the cookies from the oven.
3 Cream together the sugar, butter, egg, and vanilla in a large bowl until smooth.
4 Gradually add the peanut butter and milk, mixing well after each addition.
5 Stir in the dry ingredients: baking soda, salt, flour, sugar, brown sugar, and 1 egg.
6 Spoon spoonfuls of batter onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7 Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden around the edges.
8 Remove from the oven and top each cookie with a Hersheys chocolate kiss while still hot.
9 If desired, replace butter with shortening to achieve a crunchier texture; otherwise, the butter makes them nice and chewy.
